Shubman Gill Responds to ODI 'Easiest Format' Claim

Jan 12, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Shubman Gill Responds to ODI ‘Easiest Format’ Claim

Shubman Gill has bluntly addressed claims that ODI cricket is the “easiest format,” responding to comments made by former India cricketer Sanjay Manjrekar. Ahead of India’s ODI clash against New Zealand in Vadodara, Gill firmly rejected the notion that success in the 50-over format comes easily.

The Indian batter emphasized that ODI cricket demands a high level of skill, adaptability, and mental toughness, especially at the international stage. Gill highlighted the importance of consistency, resilience, and determination, underlining that every format presents its own challenges and requires sustained excellence to succeed.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Shubman Gill Responds to ODI ‘Easiest Format’ Claim
